name: sandalphon
description: A human interface layer for directing and supervising software agents from Stream Deck hardware.
author: Jedidiah Foster

scripts.companion:install: npm run build && node scripts/manage-desktop-companion.mjs install
scripts.validate:plugin: npm run build && streamdeck validate dev.so1omon.sandalphon.sdPlugin --no-update-check
scripts.package:check: npm run build && streamdeck pack dev.so1omon.sandalphon.sdPlugin --dry-run --no-update-check
scripts.package:plugin: npm run build && streamdeck pack dev.so1omon.sandalphon.sdPlugin --output dist --force --no-update-check
scripts.release:candidate: npm run check && npm run package:plugin && npm run release:evidence
scripts.dev:link: npm run build && streamdeck link dev.so1omon.sandalphon.sdPlugin
scripts.check: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run assets:check && npm run profile:check && npm run test:coverage && npm run package:check
